highlights.text: Serial code WB-012 | TRAGUIN tour code TR-WB-012-HNYM
State / Country: West Bengal, India | Category: Honeymoon Special
Destinations: Lataguri • Gorumara • Murti • Jhalong • Bindu
Vehicle: Private Luxury AC Sedan or SUV dedicated for complete privacy
Meal Plan: MAPAI (Sumptuous Breakfast and romantic curated dinners included)
Route: NJP/Bagdogra → Lataguri (Gorumara) → Murti → Jhalong → Bindu → Departure
TRAGUIN Signature Experience: Private walking tour inside a colonial-era functional tea processing facility with expert tasters.
Shopping: Premium orthodox and CTC Darjeeling & Dooars Teas, wooden carvings, organic hill honey.
Important Notes: Check-in 12 Noon, Check-out 11 AM. Parks closed 15 June–15 September. Jungle safari advance registration mandatory.

itinerary.title: Romantic Dooars Wildlife & Tea Gardens
itinerary.tagline: Romantic Dooars Wildlife & Tea Gardens • 04 Nights / 05 Days
itinerary.overview:
Escape into the pristine, mist-laden foothills of the Eastern Himalayas with the ultimate luxury West Bengal Honeymoon Package. Handcrafted with passion by TRAGUIN, this romantic journey through the iconic Dooars Wildlife & Tea Gardens invites newlywed couples to lose themselves amidst lush, velvety green estates, breathtaking landscapes, and deep, mysterious forests.

TOUR OVERVIEW
Vehicle: Private Luxury AC Sedan or SUV dedicated for your complete privacy. Meal Plan: MAPAI (Sumptuous Breakfast and romantic curated dinners included). Route: NJP Station/Bagdogra Airport • Lataguri (Gorumara) • Murti • Jhalong • Bindu • Departure.

TRAGUIN Curated Experience Note: Includes a complimentary welcome bottle of sparkling juice, standard honeymoon room decorations, and a private candlelight dinner tucked away in a scenic forest clearing.
itinerary.seo_title: WB-012 | Romantic Dooars Wildlife & Tea Gardens | TRAGUIN
itinerary.seo_description: Premium 04 Nights / 05 Days West Bengal honeymoon package (WB-012 / TR-WB-012-HNYM): Gorumara safari, Murti River, Jhalong, Bindu, Samsing, and 3-tier boutique resorts.

highlights.text: Gorumara National Park morning jeep safari and Jatraprasad Watch Tower rhino spotting
Murti Riverbend photography session and private candlelit dinner on hotel lawns
Jhalong Hydro Project, Bindu Border Viewpoint, and cardamom gardens on Bhutan border
Samsing Viewpoint, Suntalekhola hanging footbridge, and couple's tea-plucking experience
3-tier romantic boutique forest and tea estate accommodation (04 Nights)

days.title: ARRIVAL AT NJP/BAGDOGRA TO LATAGURI (GORUMARA)
days.description: Arrive at New Jalpaiguri Railway Station (NJP) or Bagdogra Airport (IXB), where your dedicated TRAGUIN luxury private car awaits you. Embark on a breathtaking drive through wide-open highways, cutting through the iconic Mahananda Wildlife Sanctuary. Feel the crisp mountain air as you arrive in Lataguri, the threshold of Gorumara National Park. Check into your romantic handpicked hotel with beautiful garden paths.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Scenic driveway through wildlife corridors.
Evening Experience: Romantic tribal folk dance showcase over bonfire.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Resort, Lataguri.

days.title: GORUMARA NATIONAL PARK WILDLIFE JEEP SAFARI
days.description: Wake up early to the sweet chorus of tropical birds. Board an exclusive private open-hood 4x4 Jeep for a thrilling morning safari inside Gorumara National Park. Accompanied by a professional naturalist, scan the horizon from the famous Jatraprasad Watch Tower to spot the legendary Indian One-Horned Rhinoceros, herds of wild elephants, and barking deer. Return for a lazy breakfast. In the afternoon, visit the breathtaking banks of the Murti River for an exclusive photography session.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Gorumara Jungle Safari, Jatraprasad Tower, Murti Riverbend.
Evening Experience: Private Candlelit Dinner arranged on hotel lawns by TRAGUIN.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Resort, Lataguri.

days.title: EXCURSION TO MISTY JALONG, BINDU & SULTANEKHOLA
days.description: Today, your West Bengal Sightseeing leads you to the hidden gems of the Dooars foothills. Drive through dense tea garden estates towards Jhalong, located beautifully on the banks of the Jaldhaka River. Sip hot cardamom coffee as you gaze across the hills into Bhutan. Continue to Bindu, the last village on the Indian border, famous for cardamom plantations and sweeping views of the river dam.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Jhalong Hydro Project, Bindu Border Viewpoint, Cardamom Gardens.
Evening Experience: Stargazing and romantic acoustic music session by the resort pool.
Overnight Stay: Handpicked Luxury Resort, Lataguri.

days.title: SAMSING, SUNTALEKHOLA & TEA ESTATE ROMANCE
days.description: After a delicious breakfast, journey to Samsing, a beautiful countryside hamlet draped in dense orange orchards and tea gardens. Take an intimate walk together across the hanging footbridge at Suntalekhola, suspended over a gurgling hill stream. Afterwards, walk through our handpicked premium tea estate where you can participate in a romantic couple's tea-plucking experience.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Samsing Viewpoint, Suntalekhola Stream, Premium Tea Estates.
Evening Experience: Special couple's premium spa and relaxation treatment.
Overnight Stay: Premium Eco-Resort / Tea Bungalow, Dooars.

days.title: LATAGURI TO NJP / BAGDOGRA DEPARTURE
days.description: Enjoy your final breakfast overlooking the emerald tea gardens. Capture some final couple portraits in the beautiful morning light. Check out from your premium stay as your private luxury vehicle arrives to drive you smoothly back to New Jalpaiguri Station (NJP) or Bagdogra Airport (IXB) for your onward flight home.
activities: Sightseeing Included: Departure airport/station drop transfers.

hotels.name: Green Lagoon Resort / Resort Rhino
hotels.description: OPTION 01 – DELUXE: Green Lagoon Resort / Resort Rhino (04 Nights)

hotels.name: Sinclair's Retreat Dooars / Resort Gorumara Nest
hotels.description: OPTION 02 – PREMIUM: Sinclair's Retreat Dooars / Resort Gorumara Nest (04 Nights)

hotels.name: Handpicked Tea Estate Heritage Bungalow
hotels.description: OPTION 03 – LUXURY: Handpicked Tea Estate Heritage Bungalow by TRAGUIN (04 Nights)

inclusions.text: Premium accommodation in romantic boutique forest/tea resorts on a double occupancy basis.
Daily freshly cooked breakfast and curated candlelit dinners at the resort.
Complete private sightseeing transfers in a dedicated luxury air-conditioned vehicle.
Complimentary honeymoon package benefits (bed decoration, cake, and welcome drinks).
Continuous backend concierge tracking and support provided by TRAGUIN.
All toll charges, state permits, driver food, and overnight allowances.
Flight or train tickets connecting to Bagdogra/NJP.
Gorumara National Park forest safari entry tickets and mandatory government guide hiring fees.
Personal tips, snacks, mineral water bottles, and laundry charges.
